docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,585.25 FILED BY LITTMAN, STEVEN E.  ESQ. AS TO DEFENDANT OEI, TONY MR. OEI, CHRISTINA MRS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LITTMAN, STEVEN E.  ESQ. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OEI, TONY MR. OEI, CHRISTINA MRS. $2,585.25 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,655.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT OEI, TONY MR. OEI, CHRISTINA MRS.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-18-1999, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT OEI, TONY MR. OEI, CHRISTINA MRS. PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
